title: Nilfisk Core 130 Bar High Pressure Washer with Power Control - Mini Power Washer for Patios and Car Cleaner (1500 W)
features: NILFISK PRESSURE WASHER: The Core 130-6 cleans sensitive and rough surfaces thanks to its ability to adjust pressure with the power control. It's a small, portable machine with great performance.
OUTDOOR CLEANING: Great performance to clean your patio, façade, terrace, balcony, wooden deck, car, motorcycle or outdoor furniture. You can use it on concrete, wood, stone and brick.
MULTI-SURFACE: By switching nozzles the jet washer can go from removing dirt and moss from floors, to doing a car wash or cleaning your windows.
FEATURES: 130 bar pressure (1885 PSI), 1500 W, 324-462 l/h water flow, 35m²/h cleaning speed, 6m ultraflex hose, rotating lance and portable design. Connect it to the garden tab or water tank.
ACCESSORIES: It includes a foam sprayer, G1 gun and lance, gentle nozzle and rough power nozzle. Discover more accessories in our store.
WARRANTY: This product is intended to be used for normal domestic cleaning purposes only and the warranty applies to products used for domestic use only.
description: Product Description Nilfisk - Cleaning Made Simple Leading global provider of cleaning products and services The company was founded on a vision of producing products of the highest quality and for more than 100 years, Nilfisk has adapted to the changing needs of markets and customers with innovative products and solutions. Since 1926, we’ve proudly served the UK market—building a legacy of quality, reliability, and performance. Designed for everyday household cleaning .
